parameters.body: =line_items[0][price]={{ $json.id }}&line_items[0][quantity]=1&after_completion[type]=redirect&after_completion[redirect][url]=https%3A%2F%2Fyhi-conciergerie.netlify.app%2Fupsell.html%3Fguide%3D{{ $('🔍 Parser la Demande').first().json.slug }}&metadata[guide_id]={{ $('🔍 Parser la Demande').first().json.guide_id }}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "guide_id": "{{ $('Netlify - Upload HTML').first().json.guide_id }}",
  "title": "{{ $('Netlify - Upload HTML').first().json.guide_title }}",
  "destination": "{{ $('Netlify - Upload HTML').first().json.destination }}",
  "duration": {{ $('Netlify - Upload HTML').first().json.duration }},
  "price": "{{ $('Netlify - Upload HTML').first().json.price_formatted }}",
  "page_url": "{{ $('Netlify - Upload HTML').first().json.page_url }}",
  "stripe_payment_url": "{{ $('Netlify - Upload HTML').first().json.stripe_payment_url }}",
  "created_at": "{{ $now.toISO() }}"
}
